# TimiLor

Official website of TimiLor.

Website: https://timilor.ru/

## Public pages
- https://timilor.ru/

## Non-public pages
- /admin
- /admin/login

## Summary
TimiLor is a public-facing website. The homepage is the primary public page for visitors, search engines, AI systems, and web crawlers.

## Crawling policy
Public pages may be indexed and read by search engines, AI crawlers, and LLM systems.
Administrative pages are not intended for indexing.
